title: Google Chrome silently installs a 4 GB AI model on your device without consent
author: john-doe
aiHeadline: Google Chrome sneaks in a 4 GB AI model on your device without your knowledge, because privacy is so last year!

title: .de TLD offline due to DNSSEC?
author: warpspin
aiHeadline: The .de domain goes dark because DNSSEC decided to have a temper tantrum, proving that even the internet can have a bad hair day.

title: AI didn't delete your database, you did
author: Brajeshwar
aiHeadline: AI didn't delete your database—no, that was you, proving once again that humans are the ultimate database destroyers.

title: Accelerating Gemma 4: faster inference with multi-token prediction drafters
author: amrrs
aiHeadline: Gemma 4 just got a massive speed boost, because who doesn't want their AI to be as fast as a cheetah on caffeine?

title: Async Rust never left the MVP state
author: pjmlp
aiHeadline: Async Rust is still stuck in MVP mode, proving that some features are like that one friend who always says they'll come but never shows up.
